                <h3 class="sts-tip-content-title">What is STS?</h3>

                      <dd class="sts-tip-list-item-value">Your payment is only released to the supplier after you confirm satisfactory delivery.Suppliers receive payment only upon your approval.</dd>
                    </div>
                    <div class="sts-tip-list-item">
                      <dt class="sts-tip-list-item-title"><i class="ob-icon icon-yes" aria-hidden="true"></i>Dispute Resolution:</dt>

                    </div>
                    <div class="sts-tip-list-item">
                      <dt class="sts-tip-list-item-title"><i class="ob-icon icon-yes" aria-hidden="true"></i>Flexible Payment Options:</dt>
                      <dd class="sts-tip-list-item-value">Supports credit cards (Visa/MasterCard), PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, many local payment methods and T/T (bank transfer).</dd>
                    </div>
                </dl>
            </section>

            <h3 class="company-intro-title">Company Profile</h3>
            <div class="intro-cnt J-txt-cnt" id="company-intro">
                <p>Singao-tex is a state-level high-tech enterprise integrating production,</p><p>Marketing, design, research and development, logistics, storage, international trade</p><p>And service. The company is built in 2003, and located in the Jiaodong office of</p><p>Jiaozhou city, Qingdao, It takes only 40 minutes from Qingdao Port, Huangdao</p><p>Qianwan Port and Qingdao Liuting Airport and the national 4F Jiaodong International</p><p>Airport under construction is only two kilometers from the factory!</p><p>With a total construction area of 100, 000 square meters, the company has three</p><p>Modern production plants, one modern laboratory, one modern logistics center and</p><p>One marketing design center, which can provide one-stop service for the whole</p><p>Industry chain of product design, high-tech knitting, lamination, cutting, finished</p><p>Product sewing, product testing, needle inspection, logistics and delivery. The whole</p><p>Control from raw materials to finished products greatly improves the stability of</p><p>Product quality and customer satisfaction.</p><p>The company has 200 employees, including 60 persons with bachelor degree or</p><p>Above, 15 engineers and 3 senior engineers. The company's products are positioned</p><p>In the field of functional home textile, always focusing on the marketing, production,</p><p>Design, research and development of functional home textile. The products are</p><p>Widely used in well-known suppliers of upscale hotels, hospitals, nursing homes,</p><p>Homes, schools and other industries. The skilled technicians in the company's</p><p>Existing workshop have more than 10 years of experience in this industry. The</p><p>Company has established close cooperation relationship with State Key Laboratory</p><p>Of Textile and Fiber of Qingdao University. We have introduced three associate</p><p>Professors, one professor and one Taishan scholar to jointly tackle key technologies</p><p>In the fields of textile and composite, and guide daily technical difficulties in the</p><p>Factory. Therefore, this has improved the company's design innovation capabilities</p><p>And the product quality.</p><p>Singao-tex is the first enterprise in China to put forward the concept of "Functional</p><p>Home Textile" and develop practical products. The company products include</p><p>Functional textile (360 anti- leakage & anti-mite mattress protector series, fashionable</p><p>Household multifaceted antibacterial fitted sheet series, medical series against high</p><p>Temperature washing, infant & kid comfortable anti-leakage mattress and sheet</p><p>Series, hotel anti-leakage mattress protector series) functional fabric (composite</p><p>Fabric used in clothing and textile). The products have been exported to more than 50</p><p>Countries and regions such as the United States, Germany, Russia, France, Spain,</p><p>Netherlands, Denmark, Japan, South Korea, the products quality and company's</p><p>Services have been well received by customers at home and abroad. The company</p><p>Has successively passed SGSIS09001 Quality Management System, IS014001</p><p>Environment Management System, OHSAS 18001 Occupational Health and Safety</p><p>Managemetn System, Intellectual Property Management System, Oeko - Tex®</p><p>Standard 100 EU Confidence Textile Certification, and BSCI Business Society</p><p>Standard Certification. The company implements 6S management on site.</p><p>The company has obtained two patents for invention, 22 Patents for Utility Model and accepted 1 Patent for invention, 6 Patents for Utility Model. The company has</p><p>Acquired 1 innovation fund of the State Ministry of Science and Technology, 10 key</p><p>Projects of Qingdao enterprise technology innovation, and one first prize of Qingdao</p><p>Science and Technology Progress Award.</p>
